title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Quick Setup Guide swipe left from fourth screen navigates back through setup screens in reverse order
steps: Navigate to Quick Setup Guide (QSG) by going to Home → Quick Setup Guide
Swipe through the setup screens until reaching the fourth screen (final screen)
From the fourth screen, swipe left to navigate backward
Observe the screen that appears after swiping left
Continue swiping left and observe each subsequent screen
expected: Swiping left from the fourth screen navigates back to the third screen (charging case), then to the second screen (two earbuds), then to the first screen (one earbud), in reverse order.
